title: Luffy Saves the Royal Family
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is luffy saves the royal family.
scene: The scene follows luffy saves the royal family, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HWAA IYAAH!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Aaaa Arghih Hhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Eeehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hm-Hm-Hmmm...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OuW yearh, my now! I shurr gow shliysh up ZHA Nepshoon Aamee!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ("Oh yeah, I know. I should go slice up the Neptune army!!")

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Zhehr Aigu'H Ebullrr Samunhh REE HiOR MLAERHHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't even tell what you're saying any more !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Eastern Fish-Man Island: Marine Shopping Mall

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: GIONALLLEY HILLS®

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Guaaa ha!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: URGH HOW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aaaahhh! Hhhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop this!! Please!! We won't resist any more, just don't kill us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where are these attacks coming from...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you common citizens really think you could achieve anything...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your efforts are meaningless ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where did zero-san go...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There remains but one narrow ray of hope for your kind...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 260-San can cause himself like a chameless, blending perfectly into his surroundings.

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: The three Neptune Brothers!! And soon, they too will be dead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Look! A bug!! EW! Squash it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: eurgh ... it's a cockroach! Kill it dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The voice disappeared ...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In other words, there is nowhere for you to run...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is the cockroach dead?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yeah, I squashed it flat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You cannot escape your Fates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He held on to his dignity!!! That's the self- professed "noble of the fish-man district" for you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: *Cough*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is he actually trying to pretend that didn't just happen?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes, this is a revolution !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with the death of the line of Neptune... a new king will arise!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Today in gyoncord Plaza...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: *Pant* *Pant*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... so let us go! to the plaza!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Gyoualley Hills

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sweet factory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Seafolk cultural hall

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Fish bus stop

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Main entrance

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: coral Hill

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Waterwheel Town Mermaid Cove

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: North- West from Waterwheel Town to GYoncord Plaza

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Coral apartments

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How long until we reach GYoncord Plaza?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But there should be no need for hordy to execute the king in such a public place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We'll be there in under an hour.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must be part of a bigger plan. He means to capture you as well, princes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...then so be it. Let him try....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: I will not allow him to harm my father!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I will not allow him to close off the hearts of the populace that we have worked so hard to open to new possibilities!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ... I bet it's their fault no humans have been visiting the island lately, as well!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if Shirahoshii is still safe inside shell tower...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's surprising that we haven't heard any news about her-fa- so-la-fi-do!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fukaboshi-Nisa, what do you think of that straw hat crew...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm... aside from Madame Shirley's foretelling that they will destroy this country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I sensed no ill will from them whatsoever ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...same here. The mermaids at the cove didn't think they were bad people at all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And they're good judges of character.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But this is no time to be pondering all these things we have no way of knowing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Very true- fa-so-la- ti-do, my brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gather all the soldiers of the land!!! We will rescue the King, no matter what!!!

summary: Luffy Saves the Royal Family. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
